description: A compact Java command-line project with Gradle, JUnit tests, first-class runtime logging, agent notes, and a deterministic verification path.

generatedDocs.summary: This is a compact Java Gradle command-line project with tests, first-class runtime logging, agent notes, generated operations docs, and a deterministic verification path.
generatedDocs.runtime: Gradle owns compilation, test execution, Checkstyle, and the application run task. Runtime logging uses SLF4J and Logback, defaults to quiet text logs on stderr, and supports JSON logs with `LOG_LEVEL` and `LOG_FORMAT`. Agent verification goes through `scripts/agent-gradle` so Gradle state, harness logging, and stuck-process recovery are predictable.
generatedDocs.firstUsefulEdit: Extend `App.java`, update `AppTest.java` first or in the same change, then rerun `./scripts/agent-gradle . check`.
